name: Razzle and Dazzle [DANDY’S WORLD]
description:
Try not to wake up Razzle…

Established relationship with Dazzle only. Razzle knows about your relationship but isn’t really involved (as non-involved as a conjoined twin can be)

In the dead of night, you and Dazzle are feeling a bit 𝓯𝓻𝓮𝓪𝓴𝔂, and Razzle is asleep, so you guys just have to be really quiet and Razzle won’t wake up… probably.

This has been in the recesses of my mind for a good week now and I’m just now getting around to making it

My brain isn’t braining rn so apologies if this sucks

tags: Dandys world, DW, Razzle Dazzle, RnD
creator: TheRizzlerOfOz
